title: Azure App Registration Config
description: Schema for Invoke-AppRegistration.ps1. A fresh input config contains the required fields only. The script output is a superset — the same required fields plus generated identity and _meta. The output file is a valid input for subsequent runs.

appId.description: Application (client) ID. Present in output. When present in input, the script updates the existing app by exact appId match — no displayName search needed.

objectId.description: Azure directory object ID. Present in output for reference. Ignored on re-read — the script always resolves objectId from appId via az ad app list.

displayName.description: App registration display name. Used as the search key when appId is absent (first run bootstrap).

description.description: Optional app description. Echoed to output but not currently applied to Azure (az ad app create/update does not support --description).

signInAudience.description: Who can authenticate. AzureADMyOrg (single tenant) is recommended for most enterprise scenarios.

isFallbackPublicClient.description: Enable public client flows (device code, ROPC, WAM broker). True for scripts and CLI tools; false for web apps and confidential clients.

enableIdTokenIssuance.description: Issue ID tokens from the authorize endpoint. Typically false for public clients.

enableAccessTokenIssuance.description: Issue access tokens from the authorize endpoint. Typically false for public clients.

implicitGrantSettings.description: Implicit grant and hybrid flow settings.

redirectUris.description: Redirect URIs. In a fresh input config, values may contain {clientId} placeholders (e.g., 'msal{clientId}://auth') which are resolved after app creation. In output (and re-run input), URIs are fully resolved — the replacement is a no-op.

delegated.description: Delegated scope names (type: Scope). Resolved against the service principal's oauth2PermissionScopes.

application.description: Application role names (type: Role). Resolved against the service principal's appRoles.

additionalProperties.description: Permission object with explicit 'delegated' and/or 'application' arrays. At least one must be present.

propertyNames.description: Resource alias (graph, mde, sharepoint, exchange) or raw App ID GUID.

permissions.description: Permissions keyed by resource alias or App ID GUID. Each value is an object with 'delegated' and/or 'application' scope arrays.

_meta.description: Change management metadata. Written by the script on each run. Ignored on re-read — purely informational.

tenantId.description: Azure AD tenant ID where the app was registered.

tenantName.description: Azure subscription display name (from az account show).

action.description: Whether the last run created a new app or updated an existing one.

registeredAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last run.

permissionCount.description: Number of permissions (delegated + application) successfully resolved and applied.

consentUrl.description: Admin consent URL for the tenant. Open in a browser to grant consent.
